unreleased_commits.author: JaredHatfield
unreleased_commits.message:
Enhance GitHub workflows and configurations

- Added cooldown settings for Dependabot in dependabot.yml
- Updated add-to-project workflow with a timeout
- Improved build-go workflow with permissions and timeout
- Refined codeql-go workflow by updating action versions
- Modified release-go-github workflow to specify release types
- Enhanced zizmor workflow with a timeout and updated run command
- Cleaned up .gitignore for better clarity and organization
- Updated copyright year in LICENSE file
- Introduced new .repver configuration for Go version management
- Added .gitrepoforge for project metadata
- Created justfile for build and test commands
